closed_world_scopes: applicant's declared months of physical presence in the United States during the five-year statutory period as enumerated on this worksheet
presence/absence of an alternative spouse-track claim on this worksheet
sources.limitations: Structured worksheet prepared for the packet listing dates and total days of physical presence (totaling 24 months) during the five-year statutory window; reflects only what the applicant/preparer entered. Does not independently verify travel history against external records (e.g., CBP entry/exit data, passport stamps), does not establish continuous residence, does not establish good moral character or other eligibility elements, and does not speak to any track other than what is declared. Absence of a spouse-track claim here only shows it was not asserted on this worksheet, not that the applicant is ineligible for any alternative track.
sources.title: Physical presence worksheet
